case_title: DAIGNEAU, EDNA VS PUERTOLAS PERFORMANCE C/O CILIA, VINCE

docket_entries.description: TRIAL RESET TO AUG-29-1995 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT C TRIAL OF JUL-27-1995 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $766.31 FILED BY DAIGNEAU, EDNA AS TO DEFENDANT PUERTOLAS PERFORMANCE C/O CILIA, VINCE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-27-1995 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT C
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT PUERTOLAS PERFORMANCE C/O CILIA, VINCE

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DAIGNEAU, EDNA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT PUERTOLAS PERFORMANCE C/O CILIA, VINCE DEFENDANT WILL EXAMINE AND REPAIR, IF NECESSARY PLAINTIFF'S AUTOMOBILE BRAKES UPON REASONABLE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
DEF. WILL EXAMINE & REPAIR IF NECESSARY PLNTF'S AUTOMOBILE BRAKES UPON REASONABLE NOTICE BY PLNTF.
